title: Median Order Amount
sql_solution: SELECT AVG(amount) median FROM (SELECT amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY amount) rn, COUNT(*) OVER () cnt FROM orders) WHERE rn IN ((cnt+1)/2, (cnt+2)/2);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

order_window = Window.orderBy(col("amount"))
count_window = Window.orderBy(col("amount")).rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.unboundedFollowing)

ranked_orders = (
    orders.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(order_window))
    .withColumn("cnt", count(lit(1)).over(count_window))
)

midpoint_orders = ranked_orders.filter(
    (col("rn") == floor((col("cnt") + lit(1)) / lit(2)).cast("int"))
    | (col("rn") == floor((col("cnt") + lit(2)) / lit(2)).cast("int"))
)

result = midpoint_orders.agg(avg("amount").alias("median"))
